name: quizdown-js
when_to_use: 需要把 Markdown 式题目一次变成单选、多选、排序与本地判分测验时用它,而非逐题手写 HTML——原生在多题型解析、评分归一和结果页状态上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能稳定写单题按钮 demo,做不到从一段可读文本统一解析单选/多选/排序、正确答案、提示和反馈;quizdown 让 AI 只产出接近 Markdown 的原生记法。

data_in._why_no_example: Quizdown 是 AI 原生的 Markdown/task-list 记法,schema 已钉死题型判别,不附 minimal example。

schema.source: string —— 每题以 Markdown 标题开头;无序 task list(- [x]/- [ ])=多选,有序 task list(1. [x]/1. [ ])=单选,无 checkbox 的有序列表=排序;[x] 标正确项

config?.nQuestions?: positive integer —— 默认 undefined,即使用全部题目
config?.locale?: 'de'|'en'|'es'|'fr'|null —— 默认 null,自动取浏览器语言
config?._default: 省略 config 时使用以上上游默认

uplink.widget: 默认仅在组件内本地判分;若产品需要回传,消费 AI 自行写 sendPrompt 边界逻辑,上游没有稳定公开的结果读取 API。
uplink.codex: 默认仅本地判分;若需要会话回传,消费 AI 自行写 sendFollowUpMessage 边界逻辑。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;保留可见结果页,或由消费 AI 另做结果 JSON 下载兜底。

carriers.widget: supported:host 落我们的 shadowRoot,quizdown createApp 再 attachShadow,组件 CSS 自封闭
carriers.codex: conditional:使用 pinned /gh/ UMD 副作用加载并读取 globalThis.quizdown;非 npm +esm 通道

isolation.evidence: STYLE=no:/gh/ build 实测无 document.head(grep 空),createApp 经 attachShadow 建自带 shadow root,Svelte 组件 CSS 封闭其中而非 document.head。DOM=no:mount 进传入 host 及其内部 nested shadow root。EVENTS=unknown:自封闭 Svelte-in-shadow,压缩 UMD 未能确证是否注册全局监听(倾向 scoped,但无直接证据)。shadowCompatible=yes:host 落我们的 shadowRoot,quizdown 再 attachShadow 一层,CSS 自封闭(与条目 widget=supported 一致)。

minimal.source:
### What's the capital of Germany?

> Hint: It's the _largest_ city in Germany.

1. [ ] Munich
1. [x] Berlin
    > Correct! Berlin has been the capital since 1990.
1. [ ] Frankfurt
1. [ ] Cologne

### Which of these are programming languages?

- [x] Python
- [ ] HTML
- [x] JavaScript
- [ ] CSS

### Order the planets from the Sun outward.

> Mercury is closest to the Sun.

1. Mercury
2. Venus
3. Earth
4. Mars

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to turn Markdown-like questions into a locally scored quiz with single choice, multiple choice, and ordering in one pass, instead of hand-writing each question in HTML, because native implementations fail at parsing multiple question types, normalizing scores, and result-page state.
en.why_valuable: AI can only reliably write a single-question button demo by default; it cannot consistently parse single choice, multiple choice, ordering, correct answers, hints, and feedback from one readable text. quizdown lets AI produce a native notation close to Markdown.

schema.source: string -- Each question starts with a Markdown heading; unordered task lists (- [x]/- [ ]) are multiple choice, ordered task lists (1. [x]/1. [ ]) are single choice, and ordered lists without checkboxes are ordering questions; [x] marks a correct item

config?.nQuestions?: positive integer -- Default undefined, meaning all questions
config?.locale?: 'de'|'en'|'es'|'fr'|null -- Default null, automatically using the browser language
config?._default: When config is omitted, uses the upstream defaults above
